message:
test: massive test enrichment batch -- serde roundtrips, error variants, and edge cases across 8 modules

Add ~2,100 lines of new test coverage spanning:

- tee_attestation_policy.rs (+550): error variant coverage, serde
  roundtrip verification, and edge cases for TEE attestation policy engine
- storage_adapter.rs (+401): error variant coverage, serde roundtrips,
  capacity limits, and concurrent access patterns
- observability_channel_model.rs (+327): serde roundtrips, edge cases,
  entropy/fidelity emergency scenario coverage
- lowering_pipeline.rs (+296): error variant coverage, serde roundtrips,
  and determinism checks for the IR lowering pipeline
- runtime_observability.rs (+247): error variants, serde roundtrips, and
  edge cases for runtime observability subsystem
- benchmark_denominator.rs (+235): error variant coverage, serde
  roundtrips, and determinism checks
- e2e_harness.rs (+42): additional e2e harness enrichment tests
- runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs: update expected doctor verdict from "red"
  to "yellow" in 3 assertions reflecting runtime behavior change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
